{{Infobox concept
| name = Great Elder
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Great Elder Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Great Elders]], also referred to as [[Class One Fiends]], are immensely powerful and ancient immortal beings that exist within a dream-space or prison. While they can be killed or forced into a state of death, they are not truly gone; they merely sleep and can eventually gather themselves to rise again. They travel between various worlds through the [[void]] to pursue individual, often conflicting, objectives. Although they are frequently viewed as malicious or terrifyingly alien to humanity, some perceive them as benefactors whose incomprehensible kindness could inadvertently destroy civilization. They typically exert their influence through containers rather than directly, and they are known to follow specific rules and purposes. There are seven known [[Great Elders]], each with a distinct nature and goal. [[Kelarac]], known as the [[Soul Collector]], is a legendary bargainer who trades wishes for items of value such as artifacts, blood, or sanity; he is widely respected and lacks a specific domain. [[Nakothi]], the [[Dead Mother]], seeks a balance between [[life]] and death and attempts to remake humans into monstrosities. Ach’magut is a seeker of knowledge who may be imprisoned beneath [[Silverreach]]. [[Kthanikahr]] aims to replace humanity with worms, [[Tharlos]] pursues change and destruction, and Ur’g’naut represents absolute nothingness or annihilation. [[Othaghor]] is also mentioned in historical context. Humanity has a complex relationship with these entities. Groups like the [[Blackwatch]] study their biology, while the [[Sleepless]] attempt to communicate with them to gain wisdom for mankind. [[The Emperor]] maintains stability by [[binding]] himself to their hearts, and various legends speak of warriors attempting to slay them. Ultimately, the [[Great Elders]] share a collective desire to escape their current confinement and reclaim the world.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A Great [[Elder]] haunts the [[island]], possessing a voice that can be recognized from childhood. When [[the Emperor]] struck down [[Kthanikahr]], the entity personally blighted the weather. This being commands a wrath that people fear to incur and maintains a connection where a mortal man can be bound to its heart. Furthermore, the act of reading the body of a Great [[Elder]] is something that [[Calder]] avoids.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Great Elder]] personally blighted the weather when [[the Emperor]] struck down [[Kthanikahr]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[island]] is haunted by a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A mortal man can be bound to the heart of a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Reading]] the body of a [[Great Elder]] is described as something [[Calder]] avoids.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Great Elder]] can have a wrath that people fear to incur.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Great Elder]] has a voice that can be recognized since childhood.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The physical remains of a Great [[Elder]] once formed the foundation of an entire [[island]]. These entities possess immense powers, though such abilities can be countered by certain means. Their internal wills are so potent that very few humans possess the strength to resist them, driven by a constant desire to achieve freedom once more. Furthermore, the extended lifespan enjoyed by [[the Emperor]] is derived directly from a Great [[Elder]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|An [[island]] is made from the corpse of a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Great Elders]] possess powers that can be countered.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Great Elder]] can possess a will that few humans can resist.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Great Elders]] seek to be free again.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Emperor]]'s long [[life]] comes from a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A Great [[Elder]] once bestowed an [[Awakened blade]] upon [[Calder]], though the mere mention of such a being causes transmission voices to quiver. These unique entities are known to spy on individuals like [[Bliss]] and possess the potential power to transform subordinates into dogs. While a Great [[Elder]] may have recently revived in [[Silverreach]], connections to them are also suspected within the [[library]]. Ultimately, [[Calder]] maintains a belief that the Great [[Elder]] would not be wrong.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Great Elder]] granted [[Calder]] an [[Awakened blade]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Mentioning a [[Great Elder]] causes the voice of the transmission to quiver.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Great Elder]] could potentially turn subordinates into dogs.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Great Elder]] was spying on [[Bliss]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Great Elder]] may have revived in [[Silverreach]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[library]] likely has connections to a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Great Elders]] are unique in purpose.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] believes the [[Great Elder]] would not be wrong.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Othaghor]] is a Great [[Elder]] who emerged to move openly for the first time in five years. This entity is composed of a collection of claws, tentacles, limbs, and sensory organs, possessing the ability to spawn focused creatures. A Great [[Elder]]'s presence is powerful enough to make reality shake, and they are surrounded by a fog-like [[aura]] of knowledge. Their all-seeing eyes are represented by the symbol of the open eye, and their strength is such that even an [[Emperor]] once walked away from a frontal contest against one of their creators.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Great Elder]] moved openly for the first time in five years.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The open eye symbol represents the all-seeing eyes of the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Great Elder]] can spawn focused creatures.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Great Elder]]'s presence can make reality shake.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Great Elder]] can have tentacles as limbs.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Great Elder]] is an entity composed of limbs, tentacles, claws, and sensory organs.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Great Elder]] has an [[aura]] of knowledge that hangs around it like a fog.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] once opposed a [[Great Elder]] creator in a frontal contest and walked away.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Othaghor]] is a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Known as [[Class One Fiends]] by [[Ozriel]], the Great [[Elder]] is a powerful entity capable of seeking the [[Emperor's crown]]. Following the night of [[the Emperor]]'s death, the creature remained undetected until it arrived ahead of schedule to clash overhead. This entity can attract itself with noise, lash out into reality with full power, and possess the ability to infect a [[Capital]] until all [[life]] is choked away. While it was seen on the defensive and has been known to use human vessels or command human fighters, its [[Intent]] will only slowly dissipate long after its death.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Great Elder]]'s words carry volumes of meaning.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Great Elders]] are entities that might seek the [[Emperor's crown]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Great Elders]] are what [[Ozriel]] calls [[Class One Fiends]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|No unusual activity has been detected from the [[Great Elder]] since the night of [[the Emperor]]'s death.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Great Elder]]'s presence can infect everything and choke the [[life]] from a [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Great Elder]] can be attracted by noise.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Great Elder]] can lash out with full power into reality.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Great Elder]] is clashing overhead.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Great Elders]] can enter human vessels.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Humans have been known to fight for a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Great Elder]] was on the defensive.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Great Elder]] is arriving ahead of schedule.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|When a [[Great Elder]] is killed, their [[Intent]] slowly dissipates over a long time.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Capable of easily tearing apart human bodies and minds, [[Great Elders]] are powerful entities that [[Regents]] appear to stop during their rise. While [[the Emperor]] carries a Great [[Elder]]'s heart, very few combatants possess the ability to land a blow against such a creature. During a confrontation where the entity focused on [[Jorin]], it demonstrated the ability to inhabit a host's body by bypassing the mind to reach muscles directly. After clashing against an opponent of impossible power beyond the borders of existence, the Great [[Elder]]'s ability to resurrect others was revealed. Although statues were originally intended to defend against their rising, [[Jorin]] eventually used his power to drown the Great [[Elder]] in acidic darkness.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Great Elders]] can tear apart human minds and bodies easily.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Regents]] appear to stop rising [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]] carries a [[Great Elder]]'s heart.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|There are very few combatants capable of scoring a blow on a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] is fighting a [[Great Elder]] tomorrow.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jorin]] struck against the [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Great Elder]] can inhabit a host's body.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Great Elder]] can bypass the mind and reach muscles directly.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Great Elder]] focused on [[Jorin]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Great Elder]] is clashing against an opponent of impossible power beyond the borders of existence.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Great Elder]] can resurrect someone.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder]] resisted the call of the [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The statues were meant to defend against the possible rising of a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Great Elder]] can be drowned in acidic darkness by [[Jorin]]'s power.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|"You want to bind someone else to the heart of a Great Elder? You? You’re Blackwatch!"<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|"Do you know how to counter the powers of a Great Elder?"<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
